[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111011 7
1 01011011 5
2 01100111 5
3 11111011 7
4 11111110 7
5 01111101 6
6 11111111 a
7 01111111 7
